{{Infobox concept
| name = Imperial Steward
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Imperial Steward Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial]] [[Steward]] is a high-ranking leadership position within the [[Aurelian Empire]], currently held by [[Calder Marten]]. The role serves as a caretaker and protector of the realm during an interim period, with the [[Steward]] occupying the throne until a true [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] can be officially declared. While the position is intended to provide stability, it is often tied to the use of the [[Optasia]] throne, a device that has historically driven its holders to insanity. The [[Steward]]'s authority is recognized by various factions, including the [[Imperialist Guild Heads]] and the [[Imperial Guard]]. In official capacities, the [[Steward]] may wear [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s clothing and a silver crown, sometimes utilizing body doubles or specialized armor for protection. The role involves making official addresses to the public, conducting business with various officials, and exercising legal authority, such as ordering arrests. However, the [[Steward]]'s power can be contested by [[Regents]] or regional governors, and the position is often subject to the political maneuvering of the [[Empire]]'s various [[Guilds]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] assumed the role of [[Imperial Steward]] because of the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is the [[Imperial Steward]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Steward]] expected [[Andel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] is willing to pretend to follow the [[Imperial Steward]] if certain conditions are met.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Steward]] is one of the authorities [[Calder]] must navigate.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial Steward]] holds authority that can be used to place people under arrest.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Doubt cast on the [[Imperial Steward]] can be used to pressure private clients.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperial Steward]]'s rooms are connected to some of the [[Imperial Palace]] dungeons.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“Friends of the Consultant’s Guild, this is the Imperial Steward, speaking with the authority of the Emperor himself.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
